activated_rules.rule_name: EU-origin normalisering med tillåten addition av EU-medlemsländer i fakturan

consignor.invoice_value: ERISSON (Seller / Invoice Header) + ERICSSON AB found in certificate, consignor block
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'ERICSSON AB' from certificate clearly appears as invoicing party 'Seller' in invoice header and shipping details; name matches exactly with tolerated organization suffix and address country Sweden matches (4.1.0, 4.1.3.6, 4.1.4).

consignee.invoice_value: UNITEL SA as buyer and consignee in invoice and delivery address blocks
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'UNITEL SA' in certificate can be identified as buyer and delivery address in invoice including exact match of address and country Angola (4.2.0, 4.2.2.1, 4.2.3).

goods_description.invoice_value: Description including '2F LC-LC SM 10M' with Product no 'RPM2533512/10M' and Invoice number 9209878872 dated 11.02.2026
goods_description.motivation: Certificate's general goods description with explicit invoice reference and date matches invoice number 9209878872 and invoice date 11.02.2026. Article numbers in invoice correspond to description context (4.3.5).

quantity.invoice_value: 8 PC total quantity and Total Gross Weight KG 14.93
quantity.motivation: Certificate quantity 8 pieces matches the total quantity in invoice line items (sum = 8 pieces in multiple lines, allowed by general ref 4.3.5). Gross weight 14.93 kgs matches total gross weight in invoice KG 14.93 exactly within tolerated decimal normalization (4.4.1, 4.4.3, 4.4.3.3).

origin.invoice_value: Country of Origin (CoO) field in invoice lines marked 'CN' (China)
origin.motivation: Certificate origin 'CHINA' explicitly appears in invoice in the country of origin field as 'CN' code in line items. China and CN are normalized equivalent. No conflict detected (4.5.1, 4.5.4.3, 4.6).

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical points including consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, and origin match according to explicit identification and allowed normalizations.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer och dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
